Your name on Arc

Register .arc and .circle domains. Pay with USDC. Own your on-chain identity as an NFT.

🔑

NFT Ownership

Each domain is an ERC-721 NFT. Transfer, sell, or hold forever.

💵

Pay with USDC

Stable, predictable pricing. No ETH volatility. From $1.99/yr.

🔄

Reverse Resolution

Set your primary name — map your wallet to a human-readable identity.

Pricing

Name lengthAnnual price
5+ characters$1.99 / year
4 characters$9.99 / year
3 characters$14.99 / year
2 characters$24.99 / year
1 character$49.99 / year

All prices in USDC · Pro-rated for multi-year registrations

+$100 premium for recently expired names (decays over 28 days)
